technicalFindings.detail: Public fetch found title reduced to “Fundstrat”, absent meta description, absent canonical URL, and absent structured data.

technicalFindings.issue: Index bloat from PDFs and legacy uploads
technicalFindings.detail: GSC shows many PDF URLs and uploads receiving impressions with near-zero CTR; several PDFs compete for topical searches.
GSC includes www, dev/datadev, test-appview, duplicated no-trailing-slash URLs, and direct media/CDN URLs.
Yoast sitemap index includes alerts, tickers, assets, in-the-news, and old sitemap segments; this should be governed by indexability rules.

keys: algousd major price movement reason april 07, 2026 -site:blockchain.news
queryOpportunities.key: algousd major price movement reason april 07, 2026 -site:blockchain.news

technicalFindings.detail: fundstratdirect.com/robots.txt references fsinsight.com sitemap URLs, which is a cross-domain sitemap signal mismatch.
GSC contains many nonsensical programmatic/AI-like queries and legacy pages with zero clicks, suggesting indexation needs tightening.
Organic demand still centers on FS Insight terms while the property is now Fundstrat Direct; migration messaging should be explicit.
GSC shows at least one paid UTM/GCLID URL variant indexed, indicating canonical/noindex cleanup is needed.

technicalFindings.issue: Duplicate host and environment URLs indexed
technicalFindings.detail: GSC shows www and prod.grannyshots.com URLs, root duplicates, and several near-duplicate fund pages.
Team, contact, media, fund documents, and strategy pages generate high impressions with minimal clicks, indicating SERP snippet and intent mismatch.
Homepage targets GRNY, GRNJ, and GRNI together; separate landing page hierarchy should clarify primary ETF intent.
Download handler URLs and PDF assets appear in GSC; fund documents need canonical landing pages and controlled PDF indexing.

roadmap.impact: Prevent Google from receiving fsinsight.com sitemap signals for the fundstratdirect.com property; submit correct sitemap index.
Force https non-www or chosen host, remove dev/prod/test/CDN URLs from index, and add canonicals on templates.

roadmap.action: Prune PDF and legacy upload indexation
roadmap.impact: Create HTML summary pages for valuable research PDFs, noindex low-value uploads, and redirect obsolete decks to current assets.
Rewrite GRNY/GRNJ/GRNI pages around holdings, fees, dividend/yield, performance, fact sheet, and how-to-buy intents.

roadmap.action: Bridge FS Insight to Fundstrat Direct
roadmap.impact: Build migration/brand pages and snippet copy so FS Insight branded demand converts into Fundstrat Direct signups.
Expand macro, technical, digital asset, RIA, and institutional pages with query-led sections and CTAs.
Add Organization, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, Article/NewsArticle where applicable, and FinancialProduct/FAQ where compliant.
Write titles/meta descriptions for top impression pages with strong CTA alignment and brand-safe compliance language.

notes: Google Search Console data was pulled from connected GSC domain properties using web search type and final data state where available.
US-specific query and page sections use country=usa filters; total trend charts use full domain-property data because the connector was pulled by date without country slicing.
The Solarus local/GBP module has intentionally been omitted.
